violations.text: Allergen statements are lacking on lunch and dinner menus. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato chopper) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menus that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC informed to contact service and sanitize equipment and utensils at 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
Inspector observed knives stored in between the wall and stainless steal table. Knives must be stored in a sanitized location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

White beans were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC disposed of beans. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

Utensils (cocktail strainers) in the (bar area) are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the dish area and bar. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (plate storage unit and small deli prep station) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
